summary: This is a very brief news post where Joel Spolsky shares links to four reviews of his talk at the O'Reilly Etech conference, noting that the reviews ranged from 'off topic' to 'a bit fluffy.' He also promotes a pizza and beer reception at Apress in Berkeley. The post is essentially a quick link roundup with no substantive argument or analysis.
key_points: Joel's Etech talk received mixed reviews, with descriptions ranging from 'off topic' to 'somewhere in between'
Joel curates and shares critical reviews of his own talk with apparent good humor
The post doubles as a promotion for an Apress meetup event in Berkeley
key_insight: This is a minor housekeeping post with no substantive insight, serving only as a link roundup for conference talk reviews and an event announcement.
